runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "JavaScript", "build_system": "none", "package_manager": "none", "build_commands": [], "install_commands": [], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "", "system_packages": []}, "repo_type": "library", "base_image": "nginx:stable-alpine-perl", "base_image_rationale": "Lightweight Alpine-based Nginx image suitable for serving static frontend assets; no build step required for the provided files.", "pitfalls": ["bower.json indicates a dependency on jquery ~1.10.2, which would require Bower (deprecated) to install; the base image doesn't include Bower.", "The assets rely on an old jQuery version; may have security vulnerabilities or compatibility issues.", "No build is required, but if you later add build steps (e.g., npm/bower), you should switch to a Node-based image.", "If you intend to fetch assets at runtime, ensure TLS certificates are installed in the image."], "notes": "Dockerfile would copy jquery.onepage-scroll.js, onepage-scroll.css, and other assets to Nginx document root (e.g., /usr/share/nginx/html/) and expose port 80. Optionally serve the Demo/ with proper path. The Demo/demo.html references jquery 1.9.1 from CDN in sample; could rely on CDN or include jQuery in assets via bower."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
# Stage 1: Build assets (static project, but simulates a build step)
FROM node:18-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /build
# Copy all repository contents so we can produce a dist for runtime
COPY . /build

RUN mkdir -p /build/dist \
  && cp -r jquery.onepage-scroll.js jquery.onepage-scroll.min.js onepage-scroll.css Demo /build/dist/

# Stage 2: Runtime image serving static assets via nginx
FROM nginx:stable-alpine-perl

# Copy built assets into the nginx document root
COPY --from=builder /build/dist /usr/share/nginx/html

# Provide a simple index.html at root that redirects to the Demo page
RUN printf '%s\n' '<!doctype html>' '<html>' '<head>' '<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=/Demo/demo.html" />' '</head>' '<body>' '</body>' '</html>' > /usr/share/nginx/html/index.html

EXPOSE 80

# Run nginx in the foreground
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

' '<!doctype html>' '<html>' '<head>' '<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=/Demo/demo.html" />' '</head>' '<body>' '</body>' '</html>' > /usr/share/nginx/html/index.html

EXPOSE 80

# Run nginx in foreground
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM nginx:stable-alpine-perl

# Optional build step (no-op for this static demo). Attempt to run npm or bower if available, but do not fail if they are not installed.
RUN (command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1 && npm ci) || true && (command -v bower >/dev/null 2>&1 && bower install) || true

# Copy static frontend assets and demo into nginx document root
COPY . /usr/share/nginx/html/

# Provide a simple index.html at root that redirects to the Demo page
RUN printf '%s\n' '<!doctype html>' '<html>' '<head>' '<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=/Demo/demo.html" />' '</head>' '<body>' '</body>' '</html>' > /usr/share/nginx/html/index.html

EXPOSE 80

# Run nginx in foreground
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: lightweight build of static assets (no heavy build required)
FROM node:18-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /build

# Copy only essential static assets for distribution
COPY jquery.onepage-scroll.js jquery.onepage-scroll.min.js onepage-scroll.css Demo /build/

# Create a dist directory and assemble final assets
RUN mkdir -p /build/dist
RUN cp -r /build/jquery.onepage-scroll.js /build/jquery.onepage-scroll.min.js /build/onepage-scroll.css /build/Demo /build/dist/

# Stage 2: runtime image serving static assets via nginx
FROM nginx:stable-alpine-perl

# Copy built assets into the nginx document root
COPY --from=builder /build/dist /usr/share/nginx/html

# Optional: provide a default index.html that redirects to the Demo page
RUN printf '%s\n' '<!doctype html>' '<html>' '<head>' '<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=/Demo/demo.html" />' '</head>' '<body>' '</body>' '</html>' > /usr/share/nginx/html/index.html

EXPOSE 80

# Run nginx in the foreground
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: build static assets from repository (no heavy build required)
FROM node:18-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /build
# Copy all repository contents (HTML/CSS/JS assets and Demo)
COPY . /build/

# Stage 2: runtime image serving static assets via nginx
FROM nginx:stable-alpine-perl
# Copy built assets into the nginx document root
COPY --from=builder /build /usr/share/nginx/html

# Provide a simple index.html at root that redirects to the Demo page
RUN printf '%s\n' '<!doctype html>' '<html>' '<head>' '<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=/Demo/demo.html" />' '</head>' '<body>' '</body>' '</html>' > /usr/share/nginx/html/index.html

EXPOSE 80

# Run nginx in the foreground
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Build assets (static project, but simulates a build step)
FROM node:18-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /build
# Copy all repository contents so we can produce a dist for runtime
COPY . /build

RUN mkdir -p /build/dist \
  && cp -r jquery.onepage-scroll.js jquery.onepage-scroll.min.js onepage-scroll.css Demo /build/dist/

# Stage 2: Runtime image serving static assets via nginx
FROM nginx:stable-alpine-perl

# Copy built assets into the nginx document root
COPY --from=builder /build/dist /usr/share/nginx/html

# Provide a simple index.html at root that redirects to the Demo page
RUN printf '%s\n' '<!doctype html>' '<html>' '<head>' '<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=/Demo/demo.html" />' '</head>' '<body>' '</body>' '</html>' > /usr/share/nginx/html/index.html

EXPOSE 80

# Run nginx in the foreground
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
"}

steps.tool_output_raw:

If any are missing, the build will fail., Using nginx:stable-alpine-perl is valid but pulls Perl dependencies; not an issue for runtime but could affect image size.

artifacts.content:
# Stage 1: Build assets (static project, but simulates a build step)
FROM node:18-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /build
# Copy all repository contents so we can produce a dist for runtime
COPY . /build

RUN mkdir -p /build/dist \
  && cp -r jquery.onepage-scroll.js jquery.onepage-scroll.min.js onepage-scroll.css Demo /build/dist/

# Stage 2: Runtime image serving static assets via nginx
FROM nginx:stable-alpine-perl

# Copy built assets into the nginx document root
COPY --from=builder /build/dist /usr/share/nginx/html

# Provide a simple index.html at root that redirects to the Demo page
RUN printf '%s\n' '<!doctype html>' '<html>' '<head>' '<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=/Demo/demo.html" />' '</head>' '<body>' '</body>' '</html>' > /usr/share/nginx/html/index.html

EXPOSE 80

# Run nginx in the foreground
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
